claim_or_model_use: Te/tau -> incomplete emptying -> trapped volume -> auto-PEEP
implementation_note: Core equation is not directly fit to patient data; it is a transparent educational surrogate.

claim_or_model_use: Low VT / pressure-limited ventilation; initial VT approximately 6-8 ml/kg in severe asthma ventilation guidance
implementation_note: Mostly adult/mixed severe-asthma sources; retain as conservative default.

claim_or_model_use: Low respiratory rate to permit expiration; RR increase should shorten Te and increase trapping in obstruction
implementation_note: Direction is strong; exact pediatric rate must be adjustable.

claim_or_model_use: External PEEP 0-5 cmH2O default; ambivalent effect; may unload spontaneous trigger but worsen passive hyperinflation
implementation_note: Model must separate passive and spontaneous scenarios.

claim_or_model_use: Pplat target/warning around 30 cmH2O and critical >35 cmH2O
implementation_note: Use as educational safety zone, not patient-specific alarm.

claim_or_model_use: Accept elevated PaCO2 if pH/trajectory acceptable; avoid chasing normocapnia at cost of hyperinflation
implementation_note: Avoid treating PaCO2 surrogate as a clinical prediction.

claim_or_model_use: VEI >20 ml/kg as high-risk educational anchor
implementation_note: Adult/severe-asthma-derived; explicitly not validated as pediatric cutoff.

claim_or_model_use: Measured auto-PEEP can underestimate trapped gas in noncommunicating units
implementation_note: Justifies visible occult_autoPEEP component in model.

claim_or_model_use: Pediatric intubated asthma exists but is uncommon; use simulator for rare high-risk physiology education
implementation_note: Background only; not a calibration input.

claim_or_model_use: Pressure-controlled ventilation is represented in scenario library
implementation_note: Retrospective pediatric series; scenario-level support only.

claim_or_model_use: Pressure-support/PEEP titration in spontaneous obstructed children is represented cautiously
implementation_note: Small/older pediatric evidence; not a universal recommendation.

claim_or_model_use: Delayed modest airway-resistance reduction and possible hypotension at high exposure
implementation_note: Evidence supportive but heterogeneous; not a PK/PD model.

claim_or_model_use: Gradual optional airway-resistance reduction with hemodynamic preservation; effect uncertain
implementation_note: Cochrane evidence forces conservative wording; do not claim routine efficacy.

claim_or_model_use: Minimal acute minute-to-minute bronchodilator effect; slower inflammation modifier
implementation_note: Use delayed onset; no instant mechanical improvement.

claim_or_model_use: Hypercapnia, persistent hypoxemia, HFNC/NIV need, altered consciousness
EtCO2 can be falsely reassuring in severe obstruction/dead-space states
implementation_note: Keep as educational scenario, not capnography predictor.
